title: Fix regression tests to not $error-fail assertions
body:
This fixes several `assert`/`assume` tests to not $error-fail, as this causes other simulators to fail https://github.com/chipsalliance/sv-tests

If you prefer to do this differently, of feel free of course.  Alternatively let me know if prefer the tests stay as-is and I'll get them blacklisted on sv-tests.

Thanks
